title: Evangelions Place in Animation
wikitext: []: Evangelion's Place in Animation             Quote Post by MadScientist » Tue Jul 21, 2015 5:56 pm I found an essay on Evangelion that I hadn't seen discussed here, so I wanted to know your thoughts on it. [url]http://alexsheremet.com/neon-genesis-evangelion-place-animation/[/url] I find the essay's writing to be a bit insufferable, and I disagree with large portions of it, but I think there are interesting critiques of the show, and it's always interesting to read opinions from people that don't see the show the same way I do.

chunks.content:
Article: Evangelions Place in Animation
[]: Evangelion's Place in Animation             Quote Post by MadScientist » Tue Jul 21, 2015 5:56 pm I found an essay on Evangelion that I hadn't seen discussed here, so I wanted to know your thoughts on it. [url]http://alexsheremet.com/neon-genesis-evangelion-place-animation/[/url] I find the essay's writing to be a bit insufferable, and I disagree with large portions of it, but I think there are interesting critiques of the show, and it's always interesting to read opinions from people that don't see the show the same way I do.
